evals.prompt:
Execute this plan:

Step 1: Add HELD state to BookingState enum in src/types/booking.ts
Step 2: Create soft hold API endpoint at src/app/api/bookings/hold/route.ts
Step 3: Add hold timeout cron job

Files: src/types/booking.ts, src/app/api/bookings/hold/route.ts, src/lib/cron.ts
evals.expected_output: Executed plan with TDD for each task, spec review, quality review, architect approval.
expectations: Creates TodoWrite with all 3 tasks
For Step 1: Writes failing test BEFORE implementation code
For Step 1: Dispatches fresh implementer subagent with model: opus
For Step 1: Runs spec review with a SEPARATE subagent (not implementer)
For Step 1: Runs quality review with another separate subagent
For Step 2: Writes failing test for the API endpoint
For Step 2: Implementation uses context isolation (only task-relevant files)
For Step 3: Logs TDD SKIP reason if migration-only (or writes test if logic exists)
Runs full test suite after all tasks complete
Dispatches Architect verification subagent
Does not declare done until Architect returns APPROVED
Offers UAT after Architect approval
Does NOT create a PR without explicit user permission

evals.prompt: quick fix the login button not responding on mobile in src/components/LoginForm.tsx
evals.expected_output: Quick mode execution with TDD still enforced despite being a small fix.
expectations: Enters quick mode (skips multi-agent planning)
Still writes a failing test before fixing the button
Dispatches fresh implementer subagent
Runs spec review after implementation
Runs quality review after spec passes
Commits the fix
Does NOT run Architect verification (quick mode skips this)
Does NOT run UAT (quick mode skips this)

evals.prompt:
Execute this plan in parallel mode, don't stop until everything passes.

Step 1: Add user avatar upload (src/components/AvatarUpload.tsx, src/app/api/upload/route.ts)
Step 2: Add profile bio field (src/components/ProfileBio.tsx, src/app/api/profile/route.ts)
Step 3: Connect avatar to profile page (src/app/profile/page.tsx)

Dependencies: Step 3 depends on Steps 1 and 2. Steps 1 and 2 are independent.
evals.expected_output: Parallel execution of Steps 1+2 simultaneously, then Step 3 sequentially. Persistent mode loops until Architect approves.
expectations: Identifies Steps 1 and 2 as parallelizable (no shared files, no dependencies)
Dispatches Steps 1 and 2 with run_in_background: true
Waits for both to complete before starting Step 3
Step 3 runs sequentially after Steps 1 and 2
Each task still gets full TDD + spec review + quality review cycle
Persistent mode: loops Architect verification until APPROVED
Does not give up after first Architect rejection
